"use client" import { useState, useEffect } from "react" import { signIn, useSession } from "next-auth/react" import Link from "next/link" import { Bug, Lightbulb, Star, BookOpen, Link as LinkIcon, Download } from "lucide-react" import { useRouter } from "next/navigation" export default function Home() { const { data: session, status } = useSession() const router = useRouter() useEffect(() => { if (status === "authenticated") { router.push("/dashboard") } }, [status, router]) if (status === "loading") { return
Loading Auth State...
} if (status === "authenticated") { return
Redirecting to Dashboard...
} return (
